name: Ironclad
description: Ironclad is a contract lifecycle management (CLM) platform that automates the entire contract process from creation to signature to storage. Its API enables programmatic management of contract workflows, records, approvals, and metadata for legal operations teams.

capabilities.name: workflows_create
capabilities.description: Create and launch a new contract workflow synchronously from a template with attributes and creator info.

capabilities.name: workflows_list
capabilities.description: List all workflows in your Ironclad instance with optional filtering by status, template, or date.

capabilities.name: workflows_create_async
capabilities.description: Create and launch a new contract workflow asynchronously. Returns a job ID to poll for completion.

capabilities.name: workflows_async_status_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status of an asynchronous workflow creation job by its job ID.

capabilities.name: workflows_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the current status, metadata, and details of a specific contract workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_approvals_list
capabilities.description: List all approvals for a specific workflow including their status and assigned approvers.

capabilities.name: workflows_approval_requests_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve approval requests for a workflow, showing who needs to approve and current state.

capabilities.name: workflows_approvals_update
capabilities.description: Approve or reject a workflow that is pending approval, moving it to the next step.

capabilities.name: workflows_turn_history_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the turn history of a workflow showing all steps and transitions it has gone through.

capabilities.name: workflows_sign_status_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the signature step status of a workflow including signer progress.

capabilities.name: workflows_signature_request_send
capabilities.description: Send a signature request for a workflow to its configured signers.

capabilities.name: workflows_signature_request_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a pending signature request on a workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_signer_update
capabilities.description: Update a signer's details on a specific workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_signer_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a signer from a specific workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_signers_remind
capabilities.description: Send a reminder to signers who have not yet signed a workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_signers_list
capabilities.description: List all signers assigned to a workflow and their signing status.

capabilities.name: workflows_recipient_url_create
capabilities.description: Create a recipient URL for external parties to view and interact with a workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_signed_document_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a signed document to a workflow that was signed outside of Ironclad.

capabilities.name: workflows_participants_list
capabilities.description: List all participants involved in a workflow including reviewers and approvers.

capabilities.name: workflows_revert
capabilities.description: Revert a workflow back to the review step from a later stage.

capabilities.name: workflows_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a workflow, stopping its progress through the lifecycle.

capabilities.name: workflows_pause
capabilities.description: Pause a workflow, temporarily halting its progress.

capabilities.name: workflows_resume
capabilities.description: Resume a previously paused workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_comments_create
capabilities.description: Add a comment to a workflow for collaboration and discussion.

capabilities.name: workflows_comments_list
capabilities.description: List all comments on a workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_comments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific comment on a workflow by its ID.

capabilities.name: workflows_metadata_update
capabilities.description: Update the metadata attributes of a workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_document_create
capabilities.description: Create and attach a document to a workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_document_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific document attached to a workflow.

capabilities.name: workflow_schemas_list
capabilities.description: List all workflow schemas (templates) available in your Ironclad instance.

capabilities.name: workflow_schemas_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the schema definition for a specific workflow template.

capabilities.name: records_list
capabilities.description: List all contract records from the repository with filtering by metadata, status, or date range.

capabilities.name: records_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contract record in the repository for contracts executed outside Ironclad workflows.

capabilities.name: records_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the full details of a specific contract record including metadata and attachments.

capabilities.name: records_replace
capabilities.description: Replace a contract record entirely with new data.

capabilities.name: records_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a contract record from the repository.

capabilities.name: records_metadata_update
capabilities.description: Update the metadata of a specific contract record.

capabilities.name: records_schema_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the schema definition for records including available metadata fields.

capabilities.name: records_smart_import_create
capabilities.description: Create a smart import to automatically extract metadata from an uploaded contract document.

capabilities.name: records_attachment_create
capabilities.description: Attach a file to an existing contract record.

capabilities.name: records_attachment_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific attachment from a contract record.

capabilities.name: records_attachment_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an attachment from a contract record.

capabilities.name: records_export_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve an XLSX export file of contract records.

capabilities.name: entities_list
capabilities.description: List all entities (companies, people) in Ironclad.

capabilities.name: entities_create
capabilities.description: Create a new entity in Ironclad.

capabilities.name: entities_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific entity by its ID.

capabilities.name: entities_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing entity's information.

capabilities.name: entities_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an entity from Ironclad.

capabilities.name: obligations_list
capabilities.description: List all contract obligations with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: obligations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contract obligation linked to a record.

capabilities.name: obligations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific contract obligation.

capabilities.name: obligations_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing contract obligation.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook to receive notifications about Ironclad events.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all configured webhooks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific webhook.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing webhook configuration.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.

capabilities.name: exports_create
capabilities.description: Submit an export request to generate a downloadable data export.

capabilities.name: exports_status_get
capabilities.description: Check the status of an export job.

capabilities.name: exports_download
capabilities.description: Download the file produced by a completed export job.
